hooks.command: FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // .filePath // empty') && [ -n "$FILE" ] && case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null;; esac; exit 0

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // .filePath // empty'); case "$FILE" in *packages/core/*) grep -nE "from ['\"].*packages/(server|web)" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && echo 'IMPORT-DIRECTION VIOLATION: core must not import server/web' >&2;; esac; exit 0

CMD=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.command // empty'); B=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); case "$CMD" in *"git commit"*|*"git push"*) case "$B" in main|master) echo 'Blocked: commit/push on '"$B"'. Use a feature branch.' >&2; exit 2;; esac;; esac; exit 0
if git diff --quiet HEAD 2>/dev/null && git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then exit 0; fi; echo 'Uncommitted changes detected. Review with git diff.' >&2; exit 0
